name: Garten of BanBan huggy Escape
description: Step into the eerie world of Garten of BanBan huggy Escape, a thrilling online horror game where you must outsmart terrifying creatures to survive. Trapped in a sinister, abandoned kindergarten, you must explore dark corridors, solve puzzles, and evade monstrous beings lurking in the shadows. Each step brings a new challenge, making every moment suspenseful and engaging. With immersive 3D graphics and spine-chilling sound effects, Scary BanBan Escape delivers an intense horror experience right in your browser&mdash;no downloads required! The interactive gameplay keeps you on edge, as you search for clues, unlock doors, and strategize your escape. I
instructions: Instructions Move around the map to try to escape each level before the monsters find you and you cant escape Controls WASD to move around the map Spacebar to jump Mouse to move the camera F to interact with items
